name: code-to-linkedin
description: Generate a focused LinkedIn Skills section from actual code contributions.

interface.shortDescription: Build a LinkedIn skills plan from your code.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes codebases and Git contributions to identify substantive developer skills, rank what belongs on LinkedIn, explain the strongest recommendations, and exclude incidental or misleading repository technologies.
defaultPrompt: Generate my LinkedIn skills from this repository.
Rank the strongest skills across my repositories.
Optimize my demonstrated skills for a target role.
